title: More Beautiful Trapdoors
description: This mod adds around 240 new Trapdoors and extracts textures from their respective vanilla Minecraft block
body:
This mod adds around 240 new Trapdoors. **IMPORTANT !** The mod require [Blackwolf Library](https://modrinth.com/mod/blackwolf-library) to work ! The mod extracts textures from their respective vanilla Minecraft block. So they can be overriden with resource packs as usual. Compatible with all resource packs. It's compatible with: [Just Enough Items (JEI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) To create these new trapdoors you must first create the Trapdoor Frame. Below examples of the recipe. You can use any trapdoor from the vanilla game for the recipe. You can now use the Trapdoor Frame with a block whose texture you want. Below are some examples. Some Trapdoors emit light like their respective blocks.

All Trapdoors

Example of Trapdoor Frame recipe

Some crafting examples (from crafting you can get 3 trapdoors)

Magma Block Trapdoor

Obsidian Cry Trapdoor

Diamond Block Trapdoor

Red Stained Glass Trapdoor (All types of glass are present)

Special Trapdoors

For some trapdoors you need particular crafting, you can use [Just Enough Items (JEI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) to see them. They are: Fire Trapdoor, Fire Soul Trapdoor, Lava Trapdoor(2 version), Nether Portal Trapdoor and Strange Trapdoor(no texture). ![Partener server host link](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/112d23b8-9986-4823-80de-d312484cf8c8.webp) BisectHosting offers quick, simple and high quality server hosting with over a dozen locations available across the world, ensuring low latency. After your purchase, the server is already configured and ready to use. With their 24/7 support and fast-response time, no issues shall stand in your way!  Use the promo code BLACKWOLF to get a 25% discount off your first month when buying any of their gaming servers.  https://bisecthosting.com/blackwolf ***Feel free to use this mod on your modpack***
